title: Florianópolis、SC — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Florianópolis、SCの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

FlorianópolisはSCにある人口516,524の都市です。Santa Catarina’s island capital, famous for its 42 beaches, surfing culture, lagoons, and consistently ranked Brazil’s best quality of life.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
